subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Thou through Whose Name they that are near have hastened to the shore of the ocean of Thy presence, and they that are nigh have freely given [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا من باسمک سرع المقربون الی شاطی بحر لقائک و انفق المقربون
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
